nodes.description: Snatching (?), one of the sons of Ishi (1 Chr. 4:20).

verses.text: And the sons of Shimon were, Amnon, and Rinnah, Benhanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were, Zoheth, and Benzoheth.
